sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Plus Therapeutics appoints Ron Andrews to board of directors By Investing.com
feed.summary: Plus Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:PSTV) has appointed Ron Andrews to its Board of Directors, bringing over 35 years of experience in the diagnostics industry. Andrews has a strong background in capital raising and exits, having served in leadership roles at Abbott Diagnostics, Roche Molecular Diagnostics, and LifeTechnologies/Thermo Fisher. This appointment comes as the company faces financial challenges, with its stock having declined significantly over the past year, though InvestingPro analysis suggests it is slightly undervalued.

feed.title: The Home Depot to Present at the J.P. Morgan Retail Round Up Forum
feed.summary: The Home Depot announced that its executive vice president and CFO, Richard McPhail, will present at the J.P. Morgan Retail Round Up Forum on Thursday, April 9, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The presentation will be webcast live and archived on the company's investor relations website. The company also provided details about its size and stock exchange listing.

feed.title: CTERA Named a 2025 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Strong Performer for Hybrid Cloud Storage
feed.summary: CTERA has been recognized as a Strong Performer in the 2025 Gartner Peer Insights “Voice of the Customer” for Hybrid Cloud Storage, a distinction based entirely on end-user feedback. The company's CEO, Oded Nagel, emphasized that this recognition validates their commitment to providing powerful, secure, intuitive, and reliable solutions in a complex industry. Gartner defines Hybrid Cloud Storage as platforms that allow seamless data management across on-premises, edge, and cloud environments.

feed.title: Roberts Wealth Advisors LLC Has $4.17 Million Stock Position in Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: Roberts Wealth Advisors LLC decreased its stake in Qualcomm by 22.3% to 24,349 shares, now valued at $4.17 million. Despite the reduction, Qualcomm reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates, and announced a $0.89 quarterly dividend along with a $20 billion share buyback program. Analyst ratings for QCOM are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" and an average price target of $168.00, while institutional investors own 74.35% of the stock.

feed.title: Roberts Wealth Advisors LLC Cuts Stock Holdings in American Tower Corporation $AMT
feed.summary: Roberts Wealth Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) by 40.4% in Q4, selling 11,428 shares, yet still holding 16,843 shares worth about $2.96 million. This reduction comes despite American Tower missing Q4 EPS estimates but exceeding revenue expectations, and raising its quarterly dividend. The company also saw varied insider transactions and analyst ratings, with an average "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Wedmont Private Capital Acquires 4,848 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Wedmont Private Capital increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 4.8% in the fourth quarter, acquiring 4,848 additional shares to bring its total holding to 106,063 shares valued at $34.15 million. This makes Alphabet the firm's 17th largest position, accounting for approximately 1.2% of its portfolio. Despite significant insider selling over the past 90 days, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $367.18, driven by the momentum of Gemini, cloud growth, and advertising resilience.

feed.title: Westview Management dba Westview Investment Advisors Invests $3.39 Million in JPMorgan Chase & Co. $JPM
feed.summary: Westview Management dba Westview Investment Advisors has initiated a new position in JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM), acquiring 10,520 shares valued at $3.39 million, making it their 24th largest holding. The investment comes amidst a mixed news environment for JPM, including potential regulatory relief and strong investment-banking deal flow, alongside legal and reputational risks associated with a "debanking" lawsuit. Wall Street analysts generally hold a "Moderate Buy" rating for JPM with a consensus target price of $340.00.

feed.title: PPL vs. Ameren: Which Electricity Utility Stock Has Better Prospects?
feed.summary: This article compares the prospects of electricity utility stocks PPL Corporation and Ameren Corporation, both of which operate prominent regulated electric utilities. While both companies are solid performers, Ameren shows a slight edge due to its stronger Return on Equity (ROE), positive 2027 earnings estimate uptick, larger capital expenditure program, and better share price performance. The analysis suggests Ameren is a more appealing investment despite its slightly higher valuation.

feed.title: FactSet Deploys AI Beta to More Than 85K Users, Announces AI-Enabled Document Search Functionality to Transform Financial Productivity
feed.summary: FactSet has expanded its AI capabilities by rolling out AI-enabled Document Search in beta to over 85,000 users, aiming to accelerate financial professionals' access to insights from unstructured data. This new functionality allows users to extract information from various financial documents with auditable, source-linked results. The global release is planned for phased rollout through late spring 2026, building on FactSet's prior AI advancements and reinforcing its leadership in integrating AI into financial workflows.

feed.title: Cummins Takes Forever Rising Tour Nationwide After Strong Customer Response
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. announced the nationwide expansion of its Forever Rising Tour, showcasing its latest heavy-duty engine platforms directly to customers. The tour, featuring vehicles powered by the 2027 X15, X15N, and X10 engines, will continue at the Mid-America Trucking Show and travel nationwide through May 2026. It aims to provide customers with hands-on experience and demonstrate the performance, drivability, and integrated technologies of Cummins's offerings.

feed.title: Patrick Industries' 50-foot LED wall lets customers model RVs full scale
feed.summary: Patrick Industries (NASDAQ: PATK) has unveiled "The Experience," a new digital design studio in Elkhart, Indiana, featuring a 50'x14' LED screen and a Digital Twin workflow. This studio allows RV, marine, powersports, and housing customers to visualize designs at full scale, make real-time material adjustments, and reduce the need for physical prototypes. The goal is to accelerate design cycles, lower costs, and improve decision-making in product development.

feed.title: Roberts Wealth Advisors LLC Sells 5,750 Shares of Electronic Arts Inc. $EA
feed.summary: Roberts Wealth Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Electronic Arts (NASDAQ:EA) by 27.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 5,750 shares and retaining 15,375 shares valued at $3.14 million. Despite institutional ownership being high at 90.23%, with new large stakes from Pentwater and increased positions from Ameriprise and State Street, insiders have sold 27,600 shares worth approximately $5.55 million in the last 90 days. Analysts generally rate EA as a "Hold" with an average price target of $188.30, while the stock currently trades around $202 and offers a quarterly dividend of $0.19.

feed.title: Kroger CIO Weighs In on the Future of AI at GroceryTech 2026
feed.summary: Kroger CIO Jim Clendenen will present at GroceryTech 2026 on how the company is using AI to create a more human-centric experience for both customers and associates. His session, "Supporting Teams, Serving Customers: AI’s Role in the Future of Grocery," will delve into Kroger's multi-layered tech strategy, including their Gemini-powered personal shopping assistant and real-time labor optimization. The event aims to provide retail leaders with actionable roadmaps for integrating high-tech efficiency with high-touch service in the grocery industry.

feed.title: New Uber ultra premium service comes to San Francisco: ‘First class, down to the last detail’
feed.summary: Uber has launched its new ultra-premium service, Uber Elite, in San Francisco, Los Angeles, and New York. This service offers luxury cars, professional chauffeurs, and optional airport meet-and-greet services, aiming to cater to businesses and individuals seeking a more luxurious transportation experience.

feed.title: UnitedHealthcare Introduces AI Companion Empowering People with Simpler Navigation, Personal Experience
feed.summary: UnitedHealthcare has launched Avery, a new generative AI companion designed to simplify healthcare navigation and personalize the member experience. Avery provides 24/7 support for coverage details, cost estimates, appointment scheduling, and more, while also empowering customer advocates with real-time insights. The AI tool aims to make healthcare easier to use and more coordinated for millions of UnitedHealthcare members.

feed.title: Home Depot CFO Richard McPhail set for April 9 investor webcast
feed.summary: The Home Depot announced that CFO Richard McPhail will present at the J.P. Morgan Retail Round Up Forum on Thursday, April 9, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The presentation will be webcast live and archived on the company's website. As of fiscal year-end 2025, Home Depot operated 2,359 stores and over 1,250 SRS locations, employing more than 470,000 associates.

feed.title: FactSet puts AI search for filings and earnings calls in 85,000 hands
feed.summary: FactSet (NYSE: FDS) has expanded its AI capabilities by rolling out AI-enabled Document Search in beta to over 85,000 users. This feature aims to accelerate financial professionals' access to unstructured data like transcripts, earnings calls, news, and filings, leveraging integrations with OpenAI and Anthropic. The company emphasizes a commitment to auditable and compliant AI workflows, with a phased global release expected through late spring 2026.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Launches IQ Energy Management in Australia and New Zealand
feed.summary: Enphase Energy has launched its IQ Energy Management solution in Australia and New Zealand, integrating AI with the IQ Energy Router suite to intelligently manage home solar, batteries, electric water heaters, and EV chargers. This solution aims to help homeowners reduce energy costs and increase self-consumption, leveraging the high rates of residential electrification and solar adoption in these regions. The system is designed to maximize the value of solar and battery investments by optimizing major appliance usage through the Enphase App.

feed.title: Infosys Bets on U.S. Health Tech Growth With $465 Million Acquisition of Optimum IT
feed.summary: Infosys is acquiring Florida-based Optimum Healthcare IT for up to $465 million to expand its footprint in the rapidly growing U.S. healthcare provider market. This all-cash deal, one of Infosys' largest recent acquisitions, will add over 1,600 healthcare experts and bolster Infosys' capabilities in AI and cloud-led digital transformation for healthcare systems. Optimum's revenue has surged, making it a strategic partner for modernizing clinical workflows and patient data analytics.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp stock faces dividend deadlines and lawsuit scrutiny amid community expansion pus
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp is navigating a pivotal period marked by an upcoming ex-dividend date for its preferred shares and a high-profile lawsuit regarding alleged subprime auto loan issues. Despite these challenges, the bank is making strategic shifts through app upgrades and a new community initiative in Lima, Ohio, aimed at economic development. Investors are advised to closely monitor board responses to the lawsuit and the stability of the bank's dividends, as legal risks and economic uncertainties loom.

feed.title: Dover Corp stock faces pressure amid industrial slowdown signals and tariff uncertainty
feed.summary: Dover Corp's stock is under pressure after its Q1 guidance showed softer orders in key segments like imaging, pumps, and refrigeration, leading to a 4.1% share drop. The industrial conglomerate faces risks from a broader manufacturing slowdown, potential tariffs, and lower project conversion rates, despite its long-term resilience and focus on essential components. US investors are monitoring these developments, particularly given the company's high North American revenue mix.

feed.title: Signal Advisors Wealth LLC Has $3.88 Million Holdings in Linde PLC $LIN
feed.summary: Signal Advisors Wealth LLC significantly increased its stake in Linde PLC, holding 9,099 shares valued at $3.88 million. Linde recently reported strong Q4 earnings, beating EPS estimates and raising its quarterly dividend. Despite insider selling, analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for the company with a consensus target price of $515.20.

feed.title: Spring Capital Management LLC Acquires 7,560 Shares of Texas Pacific Land Corporation $TPL
feed.summary: Spring Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Texas Pacific Land (NYSE:TPL) during the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 7,560 shares to own a total of 11,340 shares valued at $3.26 million. This move made TPL the 24th largest holding for the fund, comprising 1.6% of its portfolio. Texas Pacific Land also reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.60 per share.

feed.title: Post Holdings, Inc. Experiences Revision in Its Stock Evaluation Amid Market Fluctuations
feed.summary: Post Holdings, Inc., a small-cap player in the FMCG sector, has recently adjusted its valuation, now showing a P/E ratio of 18 and a price-to-book value of 1.98. The company maintains competitive metrics with an EV to EBITDA of 9.80 and ROCE of 8.21%, compared to its peers. Despite a year-to-date return of -1.86%, Post Holdings continues to navigate a challenging market environment.

feed.title: Post Holdings, Inc. Hits New 52-Week Low at $94.13
feed.summary: Post Holdings, Inc. recently reached a new 52-week low of $94.13, marking a significant decline in its performance over the past year with a 6.07% drop, contrasting sharply with the S&P 500's gains. The company faces challenges including a high debt-equity ratio, limited operating profit growth, and negative returns over the last year, despite its market capitalization of approximately $6.83 billion.

feed.title: Peak Financial Advisors LLC Has $579,000 Stock Holdings in VeriSign, Inc. $VRSN
feed.summary: Peak Financial Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in VeriSign, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSN) by 73.5% in the fourth quarter, ending with 2,385 shares valued at $579,000. Insider selling also occurred, with CEO D. James Bidzos and EVP Thomas C. Indelicarto collectively selling shares worth over $2.3 million. Despite missing quarterly EPS estimates, VeriSign increased its quarterly dividend to $0.81, and the stock currently holds a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $292.

feed.title: HCA Florida Healthcare and Air Methods Launch New Air Ambulance Service
feed.summary: HCA Florida Healthcare and Air Methods have partnered to launch a new air ambulance service, HCA Florida AirLife, to provide critical medical transport to patients in the Nature Coast and North Central Florida. Based in Chiefland, Florida, these "flying ICUs" offer rapid response for trauma, stroke, cardiac events, and other emergencies, significantly improving patient outcomes in rural areas where timely access to hospitals is challenging. The service aims to reduce transport times and alleviate long-term disabilities by providing specialized critical care while en route to medical facilities.

feed.title: Peak Financial Advisors LLC Sells 7,422 Shares of Republic Services, Inc. $RSG
feed.summary: Peak Financial Advisors LLC significantly cut its stake in Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG) by 72.8% in Q4, selling 7,422 shares and retaining 2,778 shares valued at $589,000. Republic Services reported strong quarterly EPS, beating estimates, and provided an optimistic FY2026 guidance. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus for RSG with an average price target of $246.40, despite several firms adjusting their targets.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace Inc. $HWM Shares Acquired by Silverleafe Capital Partners LLC
feed.summary: Silverleafe Capital Partners LLC significantly increased its stake in Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) by 339.3% in the fourth quarter, now holding 5,847 shares valued at $1.20 million. This move comes as institutional investors collectively own 90.46% of the company's stock. Howmet Aerospace also reported strong Q4 results, surpassing revenue and EPS expectations, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $256.15, despite some insider selling.

feed.title: NextEra Energy Inc. stock faces renewed scrutiny amid 2026 utility sector volatility and clean energ
feed.summary: NextEra Energy Inc. is facing increased scrutiny in 2026 due to utility sector volatility and shifts in clean energy policy, compounded by persistent high interest rates. While the company reported steady Q4 2025 results and has a substantial renewables backlog, uncertainties surrounding Inflation Reduction Act tax credits and permitting delays pose risks to its growth targets. Despite these challenges, NextEra maintains a strong balance sheet, a reliable dividend, and a premium valuation, positioning it as a key player in the clean energy transition.

feed.title: Rempart Asset Management Inc. Sells 56,243 Shares of Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. $SWK
feed.summary: Rempart Asset Management Inc. has reduced its stake in Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) by 35.5%, selling 56,243 shares but still retaining a significant holding of 102,411 shares valued at approximately $7.61 million. This sale makes SWK the 23rd largest position in Rempart's portfolio, representing about 1.4% of its total holdings. The article also notes that while the company pays a quarterly dividend, its high payout ratio of 125% suggests potential concerns regarding its sustainability.

feed.title: Assessing KeyCorp (KEY) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Price Performance
feed.summary: KeyCorp (KEY) has seen mixed short-term share price performance, yet longer-term returns are positive. The company, with US$7,007 million in annual revenue and US$1,685 million in net income, currently holds a US$21.6 billion market value. Despite this, a common analyst narrative suggests KeyCorp is 18.5% undervalued, with a fair value target of $24.55 per share, driven by expectations of improved profitability, steady revenue growth, and a richer earnings multiple compared to the banking sector.

feed.title: Executive pay and 2026 board, auditor votes at Paysign (NASDAQ: PAYS)
feed.summary: Paysign (NASDAQ: PAYS) will hold its 2026 annual shareholder meeting on May 8, 2026, where shareholders will vote on the election of seven directors and the ratification of Baker Tilly US, LLP as the auditor for 2026. The company's executive compensation is heavily equity-based, with the CEO receiving $2.75 million in 2025, including significant restricted stock grants tied to performance targets. Insiders and directors collectively control approximately 21.6% of the voting power, and the board is largely independent.

feed.title: Agriculture Waste Management Market Set to Boom Rapidly by 2033|
feed.summary: The "Agriculture Waste Management Market" report provides an in-depth analysis of the industry, including future trends, growth drivers, consumption volumes, and competitor analysis. It highlights key market players such as Veolia, Waste Management Inc., and Republic Services, and segments the market by agricultural residue management, manure management, composting, and waste-to-energy. The report aims to help businesses forecast profitability and make informed strategic decisions.

feed.title: L3Harris wins contract for submarine-launched underwater drone system (LHX:NYSE)
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) has secured a contract from the U.S. Defense Innovation Unit. The contract involves delivering a system that will allow submarines to deploy and recover autonomous underwater vehicles through standard torpedo tubes. This agreement specifically covers the company’s Torpedo Tube Newsletters.

feed.title: This Qualcomm Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 4 Downgrades For Thursday
feed.summary: Top Wall Street analysts have downgraded several key stocks. Bernstein downgraded Qualcomm Inc (NASDAQ: QCOM) from Outperform to Market Perform, cutting its price target. Terns Pharmaceuticals Inc (NASDAQ: TERN) received two downgrades, one from Citizens and another from TD Cowen, while Cantor Fitzgerald downgraded ADMA Biologics Inc (NASDAQ: ADMA).

feed.title: Honeywell pairs door access and video in one cloud system with AI
feed.summary: Honeywell announced a collaboration with Rhombus to introduce an AI-driven, cloud-based video and access control solution for building security, initially rolling out in North America. This partnership includes a reseller agreement for Honeywell channels and deeper technical integrations to embed Rhombus AI analytics into Honeywell's access platforms. The initiative aims to modernize security systems by providing a single cloud solution for multi-site commercial customers, leveraging the rapidly growing cloud video solutions market.

feed.title: Veteran tied to $15B in exits joins Plus Therapeutics board
feed.summary: Plus Therapeutics (Nasdaq: PSTV) has appointed diagnostics industry veteran Ron Andrews to its Board of Directors. Andrews brings over 35 years of experience from companies like Abbott, Roche, and Thermo Fisher, and has been involved in over $600 million in capitalization and approximately $15 billion in exits. He will play a key role in scaling CNSide, a cerebrospinal-fluid diagnostic for leptomeningeal metastases, and advise on strategy, fundraising, and commercialization for the company's diagnostics business.

feed.title: Electric innovation keeps Consolidated Edison steady after efficiency efforts
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison is integrating electric innovation, exemplified by the fully electric operations of thecrabbyshack, while emphasizing energy efficiency. The company's stock (ED) is trading at $110.03, consolidating near recent lows, but technical indicators suggest a high probability of stabilization above key support levels in the coming week. Investors are advised to monitor the impact of ongoing infrastructure upgrades and regulatory shifts on Consolidated Edison's future performance.

feed.title: On Holding (NYSE: ONON) director gets RSU award and withholds shares for taxes
feed.summary: On March 24, 2026, On Holding AG director Helena Helmersson received 1,689 restricted stock units (RSUs) which immediately vested into Class A Shares. Two days later, 440 of these shares were disposed of to cover tax withholding obligations. This was a non-discretionary transaction and not an open-market sale, leaving Helmersson with 3,105 Class A Shares directly.

feed.title: Traynor Capital Management Inc. Makes New $3.50 Million Investment in Quanta Services, Inc. $PWR
feed.summary: Traynor Capital Management Inc. has initiated a new position in Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) by purchasing 8,281 shares valued at approximately $3.50 million during the fourth quarter. This move comes as other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in the construction company, which specializes in infrastructure solutions for electric power, pipeline, energy, and communications markets. Analysts currently rate Quanta Services with a "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of $576.55, following a recent earnings beat and a declared quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Paragon Advisors LLC Raises Stake in ServiceNow, Inc. $NOW
feed.summary: Paragon Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in ServiceNow, Inc. (NOW) by 573.2% in the fourth quarter, now holding 32,345 shares valued at $4,955,000. Several other institutional investors also boosted their holdings in ServiceNow, indicating strong institutional confidence despite some market volatility related to AI product assessments. The article also touches on positive news like subscription revenue growth, AI adoption, and strategic partnerships, contrasting with neutral sentiment about high institutional activity and negative sentiment regarding market reaction to new AI products and warnings from market voices.

feed.title: Berenberg Raises Price Target on Corteva to $78 From $68, Keeps Hold Rating
feed.summary: Berenberg has increased its price target for Corteva (CTVA) to $78 from $68, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for Corteva, highlighting ongoing evaluations of the agricultural chemicals company's market outlook and valuation. The article also provides recent news headlines related to Corteva from various financial news outlets.

feed.title: On Holding (NYSE: ONON) director logs RSU grant and tax share withholding
feed.summary: On Holding AG director Laura Miele reported receiving 1,689 restricted stock units that immediately vested into Class A Shares on March 24, 2026. Two days later, 423 shares were withheld to cover tax obligations related to this vesting, which is noted as a non-discretionary tax-withholding disposition rather than a market sale. Following these transactions, Ms. Miele directly holds 7,594 Class A Shares.

feed.title: Nomura Upgrades Tokio Marine Holdings to Buy from Neutral; Price Target is 8,600 Yen
feed.summary: Nomura has upgraded its rating for Tokio Marine Holdings to "Buy" from "Neutral," setting a new price target of 8,600 Yen. This change reflects a more optimistic outlook by the analyst firm for the Japanese insurance giant. The article also mentions recent market activity involving Tokio Marine, including a strategic partnership with National Indemnity Company and Berkshire Hathaway's plan to acquire a stake.

feed.title: Agilent Technologies Inc. stock climbs on launch of advanced chromatography solutions boosting life sciences research
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies Inc. (US00846U1016) stock has risen following the launch of new chromatography solutions designed to accelerate life sciences research and drug discovery. The company's innovations address key challenges in biotechnology R&D, positioning Agilent as a leader in analytical instrumentation and attracting investor interest. This development comes amid renewed investor appetite for life sciences enablers and aims to expand Agilent's market share in high-growth areas.

feed.title: On Holding AG (ONON) director receives 1,689 RSUs vesting into shares
feed.summary: On March 24, 2026, On Holding AG director Amy Banse received a grant of 1,689 restricted stock units (RSUs) which immediately vested into Class A Shares. This transaction, awarded at $0.00 per share, increased her direct ownership to 77,745 Class A shares. The Form 4 filing indicates this was a compensation award rather than an open-market purchase, and no derivative positions were reported.

feed.title: PANOVA-4 Phase 2 trial shows promising TTFields therapy results, NovoCure Ltd reveals
feed.summary: NovoCure Ltd has announced positive results from its Phase 2 PANOVA-4 trial, which evaluated its innovative Tumor Treating Fields (TTFields) therapy. This non-invasive treatment targets tumor growth, and the company shared further details in an official press release. This news follows recent Japanese government approval for insurance reimbursement of NovoCure's lung cancer treatment and the release of its financial results for Q4 and full year 2025.

feed.title: Noah Holdings (NOAH) details Deloitte procedures for unaudited 2025 results
feed.summary: Noah Holdings (NOAH) filed a Form 6-K to clarify the auditing procedures performed by Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu for its unaudited 2025 annual results. The clarification specifies that Deloitte performed agreed-upon procedures in accordance with Hong Kong Standard on Related Services 4400 (Revised) and Practice Note 730 (Revised). The company emphasized that this clarification regarding the auditor's scope of work does not change any other information previously released in the 2025 annual results announcement.

feed.title: Ford's top-selling F-150 is in short supply, driving up costs
feed.summary: Ford's F-150 pickup trucks are in short supply due to an aluminum shortage caused by a fire at a key supplier and global disruptions. This scarcity is leading Ford to prioritize the production of higher-priced F-150 trims and increase delivery fees, impacting customer loyalty and driving up costs for the automaker. Despite these challenges, Ford is working with alternative suppliers and expecting inventory to stabilize in the latter half of the year, while also boosting production of other popular models.
